actions.description: Discovery. Search ATLAS's indexed symbol graph for relevant symbols by name, concept, or semantic hint when you do not yet know the symbol ID.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: entities
parameters.description: Entity families to include. Default symbols; memories and feedback are returned in a separate entities list.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Search symbol names, symbol-body identifier tokens, or both. Default either.

actions.description: Iris Rung 4 (~2000 tokens). Request a policy-gated raw code window for one ATLAS symbol or file only after card, skeleton, or hot-path evidence is insufficient. Prefer expectedLines as a JSON number and identifiersToFind as a JSON array; legacy strings are normalized.

parameters.name: symbolId
parameters.description: Opaque ATLAS symbol ID from symbol.search, symbol.getCard, slice.build, skeleton, or hot path results. Do not pass a file path, symbol name, or file:symbol pair here.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Repository-relative file path fallback when you have a file but not an opaque symbolId.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Required proof-of-need justification for raw window escalation.

parameters.name: expectedLines
parameters.description: Approximate line count. Prefer a JSON number, for example 40; legacy numeric strings are normalized.

parameters.name: identifiersToFind
parameters.description: Identifiers expected in the requested window, for example ["generateMusic","json_decode"]. Prefer a JSON array; legacy scalar strings are normalized.

parameters.name: maxTokens
parameters.description: Max tokens budget for the raw window.

data.manual:
- symbol.search: Discovery. Search ATLAS's indexed symbol graph for relevant symbols by name, concept, or semantic hint when you do not yet know the symbol ID. Params: query*, limit, semantic, entities, scope[name|body|either]=either, sessionId, taskText, taskType[debug|review|implement|explain]. Next: symbol.getCard, symbol.usages, slice.build, code.getSkeleton.
- code.needWindow: Iris Rung 4 (~2000 tokens). Request a policy-gated raw code window for one ATLAS symbol or file only after card, skeleton, or hot-path evidence is insufficient. Prefer expectedLines as a JSON number and identifiersToFind as a JSON array; legacy strings are normalized. Params: symbolId, file, reason*, expectedLines*, identifiersToFind*, granularity[symbol|block|fileWindow]=symbol, maxTokens, sliceContext, sessionId.
